name: Montego Bags O' Wags Dog Treats - Peanut Butter Paws 120g
description: Montego BAGS O’ WAGS Peanut Butter Paws  are deliciously chewy treats made with high-quality ingredients, perfect for adult dogs who deserve something extra special. Whether used as a daily reward, training treat, or a between-meal snack, these bars are sure to satisfy. Montego Bags O’ Wags Peanut Butter Paws  are  chewable, bite-sized treats  designed for  daily use . They’re ideal as a  reward for good behaviour , an  incentive during training , or a  tasty snack  between meals. Formulated to complement any Montego Pet Nutrition dry or wet food diet, these treats are suitable for dogs of all breeds and life stages Key Benefits Highly palatable  and irresistible to most dogs. Easy to chew and digest , suitable for all breeds and sizes. Supports training  as a positive reinforcement reward. Promotes dental health  and satisfies natural chewing instincts. Convenient packaging  for storage and freshness. Ingredients Corn starch, chicken meal, water, glycerine, propylene glycol, sugars, wheat gluten, milk ‎powder (lactose reduced), poultry fat, sodium phosphates, canola oil, fish oil, potassium ‎chloride. ADDITIVES (/kg):  SENSORY: Palatability meat-based enhancers, peanut butter flavour, white and brown colourants. PRESERVATIVES:  Potassium sorbate. Free from:  artificial sugars, soy, eggs, dairy, and meat-based fillers. Nutritional Information Nutrient Amount Crude Protein 12.5% Total Fat 4% Crude Fibre 1% Moisture 20% Calcium 0.75% Phosphorus 0.3% Sugars 3.75% Metabolizable Energy 326kcal/100 g These treats are intended as a snack and not a complete diet. Always provide fresh water.
